name: verify-receipt
_note: Authed, POST → 201 (Node @Post default, no @HttpCode). Body: {subscription:{plan,status,expires_at}|null}. For a seeded user with NO active sub, Node returns {subscription:null} — fully deterministic, nothing to ignore except request_id. If the operator points this at a user WITH an active sub, expires_at is ignored pending timestamp pinning. NON-MUTATING read in Node (findActiveByUserId only; it does NOT grant/extend a sub here), so safe to replay repeatedly. Verify against Node before trusting — if a future Node change makes this write, drop this fixture from the gate.
